problem id: a4970d02
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7)

examples:
  11100000 -> 01110000
  00010000 -> 00001000
  10100110 -> 01010011
  11011001 -> 11101100
  11110101 -> 11111010
  00000011 -> 10000001
  00110101 -> 10011010
  10111101 -> 11011110
  10101111 -> 11010111
  10000100 -> 01000010

query: 00001010
predicted answer: 00000101
